records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't expect a place like this inside the cemetery...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't expect a place like this inside the cemetery...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't expect a place like this inside the cemetery...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like it connects to the mansion's underground.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like it connects to the mansion's underground.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like it connects to the mansion's underground.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How are you holding up, Puppy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How are you holding up, Puppy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How are you holding up, Puppy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still going strong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still going strong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still going strong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The blood scent is still leading the way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The blood scent is still leading the way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The blood scent is still leading the way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you planning to keep following it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you planning to keep following it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you planning to keep following it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... I'm not sure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... I'm not sure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... I'm not sure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know in my head that I should turn back, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know in my head that I should turn back, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know in my head that I should turn back, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something's bothering you, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something's bothering you, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something's bothering you, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. That rotting stench I smelled at the entrance to the cemetery...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. That rotting stench I smelled at the entrance to the cemetery...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. That rotting stench I smelled at the entrance to the cemetery...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It wasn't the first time I smelled it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It wasn't the first time I smelled it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It wasn't the first time I smelled it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It wasn't the scent of an evil spirit or a C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It wasn't the scent of an evil spirit or a C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It wasn't the scent of an evil spirit or a C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The disaster alert from the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The disaster alert from the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The disaster alert from the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not look at the sky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do not look at the sky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not look at the sky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was the scent of hell.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was the scent of hell.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was the scent of hell.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know why that nun is here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know why that nun is here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know why that nun is here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But she's definitely connected to that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But she's definitely connected to that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But she's definitely connected to that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was wondering why the girl who foams at the mouth over a small loss was suddenly acting so different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was wondering why the girl who foams at the mouth over a small loss was suddenly acting so different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was wondering why the girl who foams at the mouth over a small loss was suddenly acting so different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You should've said something earlier. It's not like I'd refuse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You should've said something earlier. It's not like I'd refuse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You should've said something earlier. It's not like I'd refuse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm still debating it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm still debating it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm still debating it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do I turn back or see this through?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do I turn back or see this through?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do I turn back or see this through?

records.m_Talk_ENG: At the very least, I need to confirm whether that nun is involved.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At the very least, I need to confirm whether that nun is involved.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At the very least, I need to confirm whether that nun is involved.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And after that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And after that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And after that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take everything I can.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take everything I can.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take everything I can.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That book looks like it could fetch a very high price.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That book looks like it could fetch a very high price.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That book looks like it could fetch a very high price.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe... Hehehe...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe... Hehehe...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe... Hehehe...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've been waiting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've been waiting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've been waiting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope you have good news.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope you have good news.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope you have good news.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately, there's still a troublesome one left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unfortunately, there's still a troublesome one left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately, there's still a troublesome one left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And... while chasing the evil spirit, I found a dead body.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And... while chasing the evil spirit, I found a dead body.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And... while chasing the evil spirit, I found a dead body.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A body? But I made sure everyone had evacuated...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A body? But I made sure everyone had evacuated...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A body? But I made sure everyone had evacuated...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wouldn't know why.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wouldn't know why.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wouldn't know why.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What matters is that the evil spirit has possessed a nun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What matters is that the evil spirit has possessed a nun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What matters is that the evil spirit has possessed a nun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I did warn you that amateurs could end up getting possessed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I did warn you that amateurs could end up getting possessed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I did warn you that amateurs could end up getting possessed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A nun? I never called for a nun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A nun? I never called for a nun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A nun? I never called for a nun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Then she's trespassing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Then she's trespassing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Then she's trespassing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That would be accurate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That would be accurate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That would be accurate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't allow my ancestors' land to be desecrated any further.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't allow my ancestors' land to be desecrated any further.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't allow my ancestors' land to be desecrated any further.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what it takes, I want that evil spirit eliminated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what it takes, I want that evil spirit eliminated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what it takes, I want that evil spirit eliminated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what it takes...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what it takes...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what it takes...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her safety is of no concern to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her safety is of no concern to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her safety is of no concern to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How dare she enter my land uninvited...
records.m_Talk_DEU: How dare she enter my land uninvited...
records.m_Talk_FRA: How dare she enter my land uninvited...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Exorcising a possessed person is a little tricky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Exorcising a possessed person is a little tricky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Exorcising a possessed person is a little tricky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There will be an additional fee. Will that be all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: There will be an additional fee. Will that be all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: There will be an additional fee. Will that be all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's chump change to me!

records.m_Talk_FRA: That's chump change to me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, hurry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, hurry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, hurry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, sir!
